entity.summary: Global centralized exchange launched as Bithumb Global on May 13, 2019, renamed BitGlobal in July 2021 after its Bithumb trademark license ended, and later became inactive without a verified formal shutdown date.
entity.notes: BitGlobal and Bithumb Global are one identity, separate from Bithumb Korea and Bithumb Singapore. Current trackers classify it inactive, but no reliable first-party shutdown date was recovered.

events.title: Bithumb Global launched its global exchange service
events.description: Bithumb Global officially launched a global centralized exchange with fiat pairs, spot trading, and leveraged perpetual futures.
events.notes: Exact date follows the company launch announcement.

events.title: Bithumb Global rebranded to BitGlobal
events.description: Bithumb Global announced that its brand and official domain would change to BitGlobal during July 2021.
events.notes: Month-level marker because the preserved announcement specifies July 2021.

events.title: Bithumb trademark license for the global exchange ended
events.description: Bithumb Korea terminated the non-exclusive trademark license used by the independently operated global exchange.
events.notes: This confirms separation from Bithumb Korea and is not a shutdown event.

evidence.title: Bithumb Global Launches a Global Cryptocurrency Exchange
evidence.notes: Company announcement records the launch date and global service scope.

evidence.title: Bithumb Global will rebrand to BitGlobal
evidence.notes: Preserved exchange announcement states that the brand and domain would change in July 2021.

evidence.title: Termination of Bithumb trademark agreements
evidence.notes: First-party notice identifies the global and Singapore exchanges as separate trademark licensees and sets termination for July 30, 2021.

evidence.title: Bithumb terminates trademark agreements with two foreign exchanges
evidence.notes: Independent coverage confirms the foreign exchanges only licensed the Bithumb brand.

evidence.title: BitGlobal inactive exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current profile marks BitGlobal inactive without a reliable first-party terminal date.
